codeReview.summary: Implementation follows codebase patterns. Compaction is integrated into MessageService via builder pattern. HeadTail strategy works correctly. AgeBased and BudgetBased are stubs but gracefully fall back.

issues.description: AgeBased strategy is a stub - returns messages unchanged. Comment says 'would require timestamp information in StoredMessage' which is accurate but strategy is non-functional.
BudgetBased strategy is a stub - returns messages unchanged. Comment says 'handled by apply_context_budget' but the strategy itself does nothing.
Token estimation uses chars().count() which is a rough approximation. Actual token count can differ significantly from character count, especially for non-ASCII text.
Compaction is integrated in two places (process_message and process_image) with identical code blocks. Consider extracting to a helper method to reduce duplication.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The AGENTS.md file does not document the new harness/compactor.rs module or the context compaction feature. Other harness features like trajectory logging are also undocumented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: AGENTS.md has no mention of 'compact', 'compactor', or 'harness' module structure

sharedStateObservations.observation: AgentCompactionSettings can be configured via builder pattern (with_compaction) but there is no corresponding config.toml section. Compare to agent.code_mode which has [agent.code_mode] in config.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: config/xiaomaolv.example.toml has [agent] and [agent.code_mode] sections but no compaction settings

sharedStateObservations.observation: The relationship between apply_context_budget and apply_compaction is unclear. The comments suggest they work together but the interaction is not documented.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: src/service.rs:689 shows compaction runs AFTER apply_context_budget, but BudgetBased strategy comment says 'handled by apply_context_budget' - this semantic relationship needs clarification

summary: Code quality review passed. Implementation is solid with correct async patterns, proper error handling (graceful fallback on failure), and comprehensive tests (11 tests passing). Main observations: AgeBased/BudgetBased strategies are stubs (noted in comments), token estimation is approximate, and documentation gaps exist in AGENTS.md and config.toml for the new feature.
